allow: PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "Errors total: $\($out.Count\)"; $out | Select-String -Pattern "\(monitoring|tools\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell($env:SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI = "postgresql://easm_user:localdevpassword@localhost:5432/easm"; $env:SECRET_KEY = "local-dev-secret-key"; $env:CORS_ORIGINS = "http://localhost:3000"; $env:ENABLE_BILLING = "false"; & '.\\.venv\\Scripts\\flask.exe' db merge -m "merge oauth and manual_alerts heads" heads 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch '^\\d\\d:\\d\\d:\\d\\d|tzlocal|scheduler')

PowerShell($env:SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI = "postgresql://easm_user:localdevpassword@localhost:5432/easm"; & '.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -c "from app import create_app; from app.extensions import db; from app.models import ScanProfile; app = create_app\(\); ctx = app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); rows = ScanProfile.query.all\(\); print\(f'Total: {len\(rows\)}'\); [print\(f'  id={r.id} name={r.name!r} system={r.is_system} default={r.is_default} active={r.is_active}'\) for r in rows]" 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch '^\\d\\d:\\d\\d:\\d\\d|tzlocal|scheduler')

PowerShell($env:SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI = "postgresql://easm_user:localdevpassword@localhost:5432/easm"; & '.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe' -c "from app import create_app; from app.models import ScanProfile; app = create_app\(\); ctx = app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); rows = ScanProfile.query.order_by\(ScanProfile.is_default.desc\(\), ScanProfile.name\).all\(\); print\(f'Total: {len\(rows\)}'\); [print\(f'  id={r.id} name={r.name!r} system={r.is_system} default={r.is_default} active={r.is_active} timeout={r.timeout_seconds}s engines=[shodan={r.use_shodan},nmap={r.use_nmap},nuclei={r.use_nuclei},sslyze={r.use_sslyze}]'\) for r in rows]" 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch '^\\d\\d:\\d\\d:\\d\\d|tzlocal|scheduler')

PowerShell($env:SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI = "postgresql://easm_user:localdevpassword@localhost:5432/easm"; $env:SECRET_KEY = "local-dev-secret-key"; $env:CORS_ORIGINS = "http://localhost:3000"; $env:ENABLE_BILLING = "false"; & '.\\.venv\\Scripts\\flask.exe' db downgrade -1 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch '^\\d\\d:\\d\\d:\\d\\d|tzlocal|scheduler'; & '.\\.venv\\Scripts\\flask.exe' db upgrade 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch '^\\d\\d:\\d\\d:\\d\\d|tzlocal|scheduler')
